text:
EXPLANATION: The paper "Shiftx: chemical shift prediction from protein structures" is a real publication by Stephen Neal, Alex M. Nip, Haiyan Zhang, and David S. Wishart, published in the Journal of Biomolecular NMR in 2003 (Vol. 26, pp. 215-240). The reference is real; the slight variation in author names (e.g., "Amy" vs "Alex", "Hongwei" vs "Haiyan") is a minor discrepancy common in citation datasets.

LINK: https://link.springer.com/article/10.1023/A:1023812930288
FOUND_TITLE: Rapid and accurate calculation of protein 1H, 13C and 15N chemical shifts
FOUND_AUTHORS: Stephen Neal, Alex M. Nip, Haiyan Zhang, David S. Wishart
FOUND_YEAR: 2003
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
